goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 13:00' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should go to 'london kings cross' and should leave on 'wednesday'.
Make sure you get 'departure time' and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the 'south' and should serve 'persian' food.
The restaurant should be in the 'expensive' price range.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'italian' food.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 13:00 and should depart from cambridge
The train should go to london kings cross and should leave on wednesday
Make sure you get departure time and travel time
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the south and should serve persian food
The restaurant should be in the expensive price range
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves italian food
Make sure you get postcode and address
